title: Loud (Part 2)
speaker: Antwan Cronje
summary: This sermon, part of the 'Loud' series, highlights that 'whatever voice is speaking the loudest in your life right now is the one that's running the show.' It compares the lies we hear in our minds to spam calls, explaining that these voices don't need to be loud, just familiar, and their ultimate target is our identity. The core message is that 'the enemy does not need to shout; he just needs you to doubt' what God has established about who you are, because our identity drives every aspect of our lives.
quotes: Whatever voice is speaking the loudest in your life right now is the one that's running the show.
The worst spam calls aren't the ones on the phone. It's the ones that come through the voices in our minds.
The enemy does not need to wreck your life. He just needs to lie about who you are.
The enemy does not need to shout. He just needs you to doubt.
